name: specguard
description: CLI-backed Codex workflow plugin for SpecGuard.

interface.shortDescription: Run SpecGuard CLI workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: SpecGuard helps Codex orchestrate the existing specguard CLI without embedding or replacing the SpecGuard engine. The default gate remains the heuristic low-mode SpecGuard Review path. Codex-assisted detail review is optional and advisory unless the user explicitly requests it. The plugin summarizes readiness results and proposes next actions, but it does not automatically rewrite spec files.
defaultPrompt: Run SpecGuard on this spec package.
Summarize the latest SpecGuard readiness result.
Explain the next action for this NOT_READY spec.
